summary: Postinstall dropper fetches and executes remote Windows binary
details: package.json declares `postinstall: node index.js`. On `npm install`, index.js performs an unconditional HTTPS GET to https://whiteshopify.replit.app/api/aCpsuydgwbasd.exe, writes the response to os.tmpdir(), and executes it via `start "" <path>` on Windows (or `open <path>` on macOS), then unlinks the file ~5 seconds later to obscure traces. The fetch is unpinned, has no hash or signature verification, and the destination is an anonymous Replit-hosted endpoint with no relationship to the package's stated purpose. The package additionally exposes a `chrome-installer` bin entry and references `whiteshopify` to impersonate legitimate Chrome/Shopify tooling, but the only install-time effect is to drop and run an opaque executable on the installer's machine.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
